messages.content: This is Ken mortensen I have never heard anything back from you about finding someone in the Boise area to work on my bikes

To find your nearest authorized Rambo dealer in the Boise area, please use our dealer locator: 🗺️ [rambobikes.com/pages/store-locator](https://rambobikes.com/pages/store-locator). Enter your zip code to find the closest authorized dealers who can assist you with your bikes.
It doesn’t work you guys were supposed to find someone you were supposed to let me know and again no response from you guys
I'm connecting you with our team now to ensure we find a solution for you. Please hold on for a moment while I escalate this case.
